creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
MASTER_SITES in multimedia/gstreamer1-libav was updated to use HTTPS in [1], so that should have fixed this problem. The port has received multiple updates since then, so I'm closing this old report.

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=ebf585f64335d443b68d20d93c7c3fdf186b9e31
